title: APM: SQL Injection Attack in Request
description: Detects SQL injection attack payloads in HTTP URLs and query parameters captured by the SOC Application Logs parser from OpenTelemetry-shaped browser/application telemetry. Covers UNION-based, boolean-based, time-based blind, and error-based injection techniques.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ((('Request URL' like '*UNION SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION%20SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION+SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*union select*' or 'Request URL' like '*union%20select*')) or (('Request URL' like '*\' OR 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*\' OR \'1\'=\'1*' or 'Request URL' like '*%27%20OR%201%3D1*' or 'Request URL' like '*\' AND 1=1*' or 'Request URL' like '*OR+1=1*')) or (('Request URL' like '*DROP TABLE*' or 'Request URL' like '*DROP%20TABLE*' or 'Request URL' like '*DELETE FROM*' or 'Request URL' like '*INSERT INTO*' or 'Request URL' like '*UPDATE SET*')) or (('Request URL' like '*WAITFOR DELAY*' or 'Request URL' like '*BENCHMARK(*' or 'Request URL' like '*SLEEP(*' or 'Request URL' like '*pg_sleep*')) or (('Request URL' like '*INFORMATION_SCHEMA*' or 'Request URL' like '*information_schema*' or 'Request URL' like '*sysobjects*' or 'Request URL' like '*syscolumns*' or 'Request URL' like '*ORDER BY 1*'))) | stats count as Attacks by 'Request URL', 'HTTP Method', 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Attacks
falsepositives: Legitimate search queries containing SQL keywords
